title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Foeniculum vulgare, also known as fennel, essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The oil's compounds, including anethole and fenchone, have been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the colon, which are contributing factors to ulcerative colitis.
